case.title: Users should see the "Create an Account" page to register.
User should see the title "Create an account" at the top of the page.
User should be able to enter their email in the "Email" field.
User should receive a validation error "This field can't be empty" when the Email input field is left blank.
User should be able to enter their password in the "Password" field.
User should receive a validation error "This field can't be empty" when the Password input field is left blank.
User should be able to enter their password again in the "Repeat password" field to confirm.
User should receive a validation error "This field can't be empty" when the Repeat Password input field is left blank.
User should be able to click the [Create Account] button to submit the registration form.
User should see the "Sign in with" section below the Create Account button.
User should see the Google sign-up option.
User should be able to sign up using the Google sign-up option.
User should see the Apple sign-up option.
User should be able to sign up using the Apple sign-up option.
User should see the Chats tab in the bottom navigation bar.
User should see the Chats tab highlighted when on the Chats page.
User should see the title "My chats" at the top of the Chats page.
User should see the search icon at the top right of the page.
User should see the All tab as the default selection on Chat page.
User should see the All tab text highlighted when selected.

section.name: Message: There is no messages yet

case.title: User should see the message "There is no messages yet" when no messages exist.

section.name: Descriptions: Your future chats with hiring managers.

case.title: User should see the description "Your future chats with hiring managers" below the message.
User should see the Archive tab on the Chats page.
User should see the Archive tab text highlighted when selected.

section.name: Message: There is no messages yet

case.title: User should see the message "There are no messages yet" if no chats exist in the Archive tab.

section.name: Descriptions: Your future chats with hiring managers.

case.title: User should see the description text "Your future chats with hiring managers" in the Archive tab if no chats exist.
User should see the Profile tab in the bottom navigation bar.
User should see the Profile tab highlighted when on the Profile page.
User should be able to navigate between Chats and Profile sections.
User should see the title "I am..." at the top of the Profile section.
User should see the option "CANDIDATE - hunting for interesting job offers".
User should be able to choose the Candidate option to proceed.

section.name: Back Navigation Button: Left arrow icon.

case.title: User should see the back navigation button (left arrow icon) at the top left of the page.
User should be able to click the back navigation button (left arrow icon).
User should navigate to the previous screen upon clicking the back navigation button.
User should be redirected to enter the candidate's profile information on the Profile information page.
User should see subtitle "Hiring managers filter engineers based on this information".
User should see the Role tab on the Profile information page.
User should see "Desired position" field in the Role tab.

section.name: Input field with "Example: Senior Java Engineer"

case.title: User should be able to enter their desired position in the field.

section.name: Validation Message: "This field can't be empty".

case.title: User should see a validation message 'This field can't be empty' if 'Desired Position' is left blank.
Use should see the "Desired roles" option in the Role tab.
User should be able to click on the [>] button to see the list of options.
User should be able to select any option in the list.

section.name: Validation Message: "This field can't be empty".

case.title: User should see a validation message 'This field can't be empty' if 'Specialisation' is not selected.

section.name: Type and select strongest tech skills:

case.title: Use rshould see "Type and select strongest tech skills" option in the Role tab.
User should be able to click on the [>] button to see the list of options.
User should be able to type and select their strongest tech skills from the list.
User should be able to deselect a previously selected tech skill by tapping on it again.
User should save their skills by clicking [Save changers].

section.name: Validation Message: "This field can't be empty".

case.title: User should see a validation message 'This field can't be empty' if tech skills are not selected.
User should proceed to the next step by clicking the [SAVE AND CONTINUE] button when all fields are filled.
User should see the Expectations tab on the Profile information page.
User should see "Desired Base Salary, $ " field in the Expectations tab.
User should be able to toggle between 'Monthly' and 'Annual' salary options.

section.name: Input field with '$ Desired monthly salary'

case.title: User should be able to input 'Desired monthly salary' value.

section.name: Input field with '$ Desired annual salary'

case.title: User should be able to input 'Desired annual salary' value.

section.name: Validation Message: "This field can't be empty".

case.title: User should see validation error 'This field can't be empty' when 'Desired monthly salary' is left blank.
User should be able select their work experience on the Expectations tab.
User should be able to select 'Work experience' from the Select list.

section.name: Validation Message: "This field can't be empty".

case.title: User should see validation error 'This field can't be empty' when 'Work experience' is not selected.
User should be able select their English level on the Expectations tab.
User should be able to select 'English level' from the select list.

section.name: Validation Message: "This field can't be empty".

case.title: User should see validation error 'This field can't be empty' when 'English level' is not selected.
User should be able select their location on the Expectations tab.
After clicking the [>] button in 'Select your location,' the user should be redirected to search for a location.
User should be able to select a location in 'Select your location'.
User should be able delete the previously selected location by clicking [x].
User should be able to save their location by clicking [Save changers].
User should be able to select Remote and Office employment options on the Expectations tab.
User should be able to check 'Remote' option in Employment Options.
User should be able to check 'Office' options in Employment Options.
User should be able to search for a location in 'Location Search Redirect'.
User should be able to select a location in 'Location Search Redirect'.
User should proceed to the next step by clicking the [SAVE AND CONTINUE] button when all fields are filled.
User should see the Bio tab on the Profile information page.
User should see hints on how to fill the profile properly on Bio tab.

section.name: Fill profile properly to receive offers.

case.title: User should see profile hint: Fill profile properly to receive exciting offers from companies.
User should see profile hint: Hiring managers don't pay attention to templated profiles.
User should view good profile examples with links on the Bio tab.
User should view good profile examples with links for "Frontend Engineer."
User should view good profile examples with links for "Mobile Engineer."
User should view good profile examples with links for "Backend Engineer."
User should see the Achievements/Key Results section on Bio tab.
User should see the Achievements/Key Results input field on Bio tab.
User should be able to enter achievements in the Achievements/Key Results field.

section.name: Placeholder: Instructions for key results and contributions.

case.title: User should see a placeholder in the Achievements/Key Results input field with instructions.
User should receive a validation error message “This field can't be empty” if Achievements/Key Results is left blank.
User should see the Work Experience section on Bio tab.
User should be able to enter work experience details in the Work Experience input field.

section.name: Placeholder: Instructions about career roles and problem-solving contributions.

case.title: User should see a placeholder in the Work Experience input field with instructions.
User should receive a validation error message “This field can't be empty” if Work Experience is left blank.
User should see the Job Expectations (Optional) section on Bio tab.
User should be able to enter job expectations in the Job Expectations input field.

section.name: Placeholder: Instructions for next job expectations.

case.title: User should see a placeholder in the Job Expectations input field with instructions for next job expectations.
User should proceed to the preview profile by clicking the [SAVE AND CONTINUE] button when all fields are filled.
User should see the option "RECRUITER - hiring talent".
User should be able to choose the Recruiter option to proceed.

section.name: Back Navigation Button: Left arrow icon.

case.title: User should see a Back Navigation Button with a left arrow icon.
User should be able to click the back navigation button (left arrow icon).
User should navigate to the previous screen upon clicking the back navigation button.
User should see the page title 'Company details' when on the Recruiter section.

section.name: Instruction: "Please, fill the information about the Company you represent."

case.title: User should see the instruction: "Please, fill in the information about the Company you represent".
User should be able to input text into the 'My role' field.
User should see a placeholder text 'My role' in the 'My role' input field.
User should see a validation message 'This field can't be empty' if the 'My role' field is left blank.
User should be able to input text into the 'Company' field.
User should see a placeholder text 'Company' in the 'Company' input field.
User should see a validation message 'This field can't be empty' if the 'Company' field is left blank.
User should be able to click the [SAVE AND CONTINUE] button to proceed when all fields are filled.
User should see the Sign out link at the bottom of the Profile section.
User should be able to log out by clicking the Sign out link.
Users should see the "Sign in to you account" page to register.
User should see the title "Sign in to you account" at the top of the page.
User should be able to enter their email in the "Email" field.
User should receive a validation error "This field can't be empty" when the Email input field is left blank.
User should be able to enter their password in the "Password" field.
User should receive a validation error "This field can't be empty" when the Password input field is left blank.
User should see the [Sign In] button below the 'Password' field.
User should be able to click the [Sign In] button to submit the login form.
User should see the 'Forgot password' link below the 'Sign In' button.
User should be redirected to the 'Forgot Password' screen when clicking the link.
User should see the "Sign in with" section on the "Sign in" page.
User should be able to sign in using Google.
User should be able to sign in using Apple.

section.name: Don't have an account 'Sign up' link

case.title: User should be redirected to the 'Sign Up' screen when clicking the 'Sign Up' link.
User should see the Chats tab in the bottom navigation bar.
User should see the Chats tab highlighted when on the Chats page
User should search for chats using the search field.
User should see the All tab as the default selection on Chat page.
User should see the All tab text highlighted when selected.
User should be able to open the chat by clicking on any part of a user's row in the 'All' chat list
User should view roles of users in the chat list.
User should view names of users in the chat list.
User should view status indicators in the chat list.
User should view the timestamp of the last message in the chat list.
User should view the profile picture in the chat header.
User should be redirected to the Preview Profile page after clicking on the user's profile picture.
User should view the role of the user in the chat header.
User should view the name of the user in the chat header.
User should view the timestamp of the last message in the chat header.
User should open the Actions menu in the chat header.
User should select the "Share my contacts & CV" option from the Actions menu (for Candidates).
User should view date separators for sent messages in the timeline.
User should view the profile picture next to sent messages.
User should view timestamps for sent messages in the timeline.
User should view the send message text in the timeline.
User should view date separators for received messages in the timeline.
User should view the profile picture next to received messages.
User should view timestamps for received messages in the timeline.
User should view the received message text in the timeline.
User should express interest in a job offer using the [INTERESTED] button (Recruiter-specific).
User should decline a job offer using the [NOT INTERESTED] button (Recruiter-specific).
User should type a message in the input field.
User should send a message using the [Send] button.
User should access the archived chat list.
User should view roles of users in the archived chat list.
User should view names of users in the archived chat list.
User should view status indicators in the archived chat list.
User should view the timestamp of the last message in the archived chat list.
User should view the profile picture in the chat header.
User should click the profile picture in the chat header to view details.
User should view the role of the user in the chat header.
User should view the name of the user in the chat header.
User should view the timestamp of the last message in the chat header.
User should open the Actions menu in the chat header.
User should select the "Share my contacts & CV" option from the Actions menu (for Candidates).
User should view date separators for sent messages in the archived chat timeline.
User should view the profile picture next to sent messages in archived chats.
User should view timestamps for sent messages in the archived chat timeline.
User should view the send message text in the timeline
User should view date separators for received messages in the archived chat timeline.
User should view the profile picture next to received messages in archived chats.
User should view timestamps for received messages in the archived chat timeline.
User should view the received message text in the timeline
User should express interest in a job offer using the [INTERESTED] button in archived chats (Recruiter-specific).
User should decline a job offer using the [NOT INTERESTED] button in archived chats (Recruiter-specific).
ser should type a message in the input field.
User should send a message in archived chats using the [Send] button.
Mobile app user should preview profiles within the app.
Mobile app user should be able to edit basic profile information.
User should select the "Candidate Profile" radio button to switch to candidate-specific settings.
User should view their profile picture displayed under the Candidate Profile.
User should view their name displayed under the Candidate Profile.
Mobile app user should be able to switch between active and inactive profile statuses.
User should view their current status (Inactive or Active) under the Candidate Profile.
User should open the "Preview Profile" page by clicking the [Preview Profile] button.
User should view the profile picture in the Preview Profile page.
User should view their name in the Preview Profile page.
User should view their profile status (Active or Inactive) in the Preview Profile page.
User should view their contact email in the Preview Profile page.
User should view linked social profiles (LinkedIn, Behance, GitHub) in the Preview Profile page.
User should view the desired position under the Preview Profile page.
User should view the list of technologies added under the Preview Profile page.
User should view the desired base salary (in $) in the Preview Profile page.
User should view their job experience listed in the Preview Profile page.
User should view the city under the Preview Profile page.
User should view the desired office locations under the Preview Profile page.
User should view the achievements/key results under the Preview Profile page.
User should activate their profile by clicking the [Activate Profile] button in the Preview Profile page.
User should deactivate their profile by clicking the [Deactivate Profile] button in the Preview Profile page.
User should edit their profile by clicking the [Edit] button in the Preview Profile page.
User should view the information icon with the message: "This information can only be viewed by hiring managers when shared."
User should view their profile picture in the Contact Information section.
User should fill in the "First Name" input field in the Contact Information section.
User should fill in the "Last Name" input field in the Contact Information section.
User should add their LinkedIn profile in the "LinkedIn" input field.
User should add their Behance profile in the "Behance" input field.
User should add their GitHub profile in the "GitHub" input field.
User should save and preview their profile by clicking the [Save and Preview Profile] button.
User should toggle notifications on or off in the Preferences section.
User should view and access the "Privacy Policy" in the Preferences section.
User should sign out of their profile by clicking the [Sign Out] link.
User should select the "Recruiter Profile" radio button to switch to recruiter-specific settings.
User should view their profile picture displayed under the Recruiter Profile.
User should view their name displayed under the Recruiter Profile.
User should view their current status (Active or Inactive) under the Recruiter Profile.
User should open the "Preview Profile" page by clicking the [Preview Profile] button.
User should view the profile picture in the Preview Profile page.
User should view their name in the Preview Profile page.
User should view their profile status (Active or Inactive) in the Preview Profile page.
User should view their contact email in the Preview Profile page.
User should view their role in the Preview Profile page.
User should view their company name in the Preview Profile page.
User should open the "Contact Information" page by clicking the [Contact Information] button.
User should view the information icon with the message: "This information can only be viewed by hiring managers when shared."
User should view their profile picture in the Contact Information section.
User should fill in the "First Name" input field in the Contact Information section.
User should fill in the "Last Name" input field in the Contact Information section.
User should add their LinkedIn profile in the "LinkedIn" input field.
User should add their Behance profile in the "Behance" input field.
User should add their GitHub profile in the "GitHub" input field.
User should save and preview their profile by clicking the [Save and Preview Profile] button.
User should open the "Preferences" page by clicking the [Preferences] button.
User should toggle notifications on or off in the Preferences section.
User should view and access the "Privacy Policy" in the Preferences section.
User should sign out of their profile by clicking the [Sign Out] link.
